temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) In a dark, almost completely black scene, a small, blue and red boat with three figures inside is faintly illuminated. The central figure, an older man with white hair, stands up and shouts with a wide, triumphant grin. The other two figures, a young man and a woman, are seated behind him, barely visible in the darkness. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a mysterious and dramatic scene, introducing three characters in a small boat in a dark, ambiguous setting. The older man's triumphant shout immediately creates a sense of high stakes or a significant victory.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Triumphant, loud, and excited. 2) Background sounds: The faint sound of water lapping against the boat.)
(00:03-00:05) The scene cuts to a close-up of an older man with gray hair, wearing a suit. He is on the phone, a smug, satisfied smile playing on his lips as he listens. In the background, a few other people are seated, out of focus. (Storyline: This cut introduces a new character who appears to be the mastermind or antagonist. His smug expression suggests he is pleased with the outcome of the situation hinted at in the previous scene, likely involving the cocaine.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds: Faint, indistinct chatter and ambient room tone.)
